top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'Tabor';

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'Tabor';

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'Tabor'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.account_id = a.account_id
);

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'Tabor'
AND a.account_id IN (SELECT account_id FROM loan);

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'Tabor';

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'Tabor'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM loan l
    WHERE l.account_id = a.account_id
);

SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'Tabor'
AND a.account_id IN (
    SELECT account_id 
    FROM loan 
    WHERE status IN ('A', 'C')  -- assuming active or approved loans indicate eligibility
);

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.account_id
FROM account a
JOIN district d ON a.district_id = d.district_id
JOIN loan l ON a.account_id = l.account_id
WHERE d.A2 = 'Tabor';
